question: Are we getting faster at shipping orders?
sql: SELECT FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m', created_at) AS month, ROUND(AVG(TIMESTAMP_DIFF(shipped_at, created_at, HOUR)), 1) AS avg_hours_to_ship FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` WHERE shipped_at IS NOT NULL AND created_at >= TIMESTAMP(DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), MONTH)) GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
analyst_notes: Fulfillment lag = order to shipment, shipped items only. The latest month biases FAST: its slow orders haven't shipped yet, so they're excluded — recent months always look better than they are. Flag this censoring.
author: claude-draft
